info.name: EverCut - Customer Profile
info.description: Customer profile management and homepage endpoints

request.description:
Get customer profile information.

Requires: CUSTOMER role

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "...",
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "phoneNumber": "+1234567890",
    "gender": "Male",
    "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-01",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "photoUrl": "https://...",
    "location": {...}
  }
}
